phase_in_plan: Milestone A — Real horizon closure (next_half_year, next_year)

forward_returns_run_py.summary: Added H_NEXT_HALF_YEAR / H_NEXT_YEAR constants (126 / 252 trading days), FORWARD_HORIZON_SPECS tuple, bumped DEFAULT_PRICE_LOOKAHEAD_DAYS to 520 so 1y returns are resolvable from silver prices.

validation_panel_run_py.summary: Fetches next_half_year / next_year from forward_returns_daily_horizons, writes raw_return_6m / excess_return_6m / raw_return_1y / excess_return_1y, and appends missing_forward_return_6m / 1y quality flags when absent.

validation_runner_py.summary: HORIZON_RETURN_KEYS now maps next_half_year → (raw_return_6m, excess_return_6m) and next_year → (raw_return_1y, excess_return_1y); factor validation can now produce summaries / quantiles for the two new horizons.

validation_registry_py.summary: All VALIDATION_FACTORS_V1 opt into SUPPORTED_HORIZONS_V1 = (next_month, next_quarter, next_half_year, next_year).

supabase_migration.summary: Adds raw_return_6m / excess_return_6m / raw_return_1y / excess_return_1y columns (nullable) to factor_market_validation_panels. Backwards compatible: existing rows remain valid with NULL on the new columns.

bundle_build_v2.summary: Opt-in config that extends v1 with accruals × next_half_year / next_year gates marked auto_degrade_optional_gates until data lands; horizon_fallback_labels remain for medium_long / long until real_derived entries appear.

schema_notes.summary: Documents the horizon_type extension and the new panel columns.

tests_added.summary: Five unit tests covering FORWARD_HORIZON_SPECS coverage, long-horizon forward_return_over_trading_days compatibility, HORIZON_RETURN_KEYS wiring, validation factor registry opt-in, and validation-panel upsert row shape.

regression_gates.pytest_full_suite_minus_pre_existing_pha: 745 passed (pre-existing phase39_hypothesis_family failure excluded per HANDOFF).

operator_follow_up_required: Apply supabase migration 20260417100000_forward_returns_long_horizons_v1.sql to add the four long-horizon columns.
Re-run build-forward-returns so H_NEXT_HALF_YEAR / H_NEXT_YEAR rows appear in forward_returns_daily_horizons.
Re-run build-validation-panel so the new columns get populated for filings with enough forward price history.
Re-run run-factor-validation for horizon_type=next_half_year / next_year (accruals / gross_profitability) and certify-factor-validation-pit afterwards.
Optionally switch the bundle builder to data/mvp/metis_brain_bundle_build_v2.json to attempt real_derived medium_long / long; optional gates auto-degrade until data is ready.
